title: Write ferrum_extlib_coap.md
description: CCSP lib_ccsp_coap (roadmap): CoAP (RFC 7252) over UDP/DTLS for constrained devices and IoT (Matter protocol). Not in Ferrum stdlib. Design extlib module: CoAP server/client with URI routing, confirmable/non-confirmable messages, observe (RFC 7641), block-wise transfer (RFC 7959), coaps:// via DTLS extlib, CBOR payloads, multicast group communication.
